input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.5.2
            TITLE: the tank will be filled to the fill line, or if a filling system is used, to the automatic stop point.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.5.2: The tank will be filled to the fill line, or if a filling system is used, to the automatic stop point.
IC.5.5.2 The tank will be filled to the fill line, or if a filling system is used, to the automatic stop point.

final_answer: The tank will be filled to the fill line, or if a filling system is used, to the automatic stop point.
